mapper.sql: SELECT aul.id, aul.user_id, u.email AS user_email, aul.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, aul.feature_type, aul.status, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage, aul.credit_used, aul.error_message, aul.created_at FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON aul.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON aul.application_case_id = ac.id

choose.when: ORDER BY aul.created_at ASC, aul.id ASC
ORDER BY aul.token_usage DESC, aul.id DESC
ORDER BY aul.token_usage IS NULL, aul.token_usage ASC, aul.id ASC
ORDER BY aul.credit_used DESC, aul.id DESC
ORDER BY aul.credit_used ASC, aul.id ASC
ORDER BY aul.model DESC, aul.id DESC
ORDER BY aul.model IS NULL, aul.model ASC, aul.id ASC
ORDER BY aul.feature_type DESC, aul.id DESC
ORDER BY aul.feature_type ASC, aul.id ASC
ORDER BY aul.status DESC, aul.id DESC
ORDER BY aul.status ASC, aul.id ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY aul.created_at DESC, aul.id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN aul.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN aul.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_count, COALESCE(SUM(aul.token_usage), 0) AS token_usage, COALESCE(SUM(aul.credit_used), 0) AS credit_used, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN aul.feature_type = 'JOB_ANALYSIS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS job_analysis_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN aul.feature_type = 'COMPANY_RESEARCH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS company_research_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN aul.feature_type = 'JOB_POSTING_OCR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS job_posting_ocr_count FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON aul.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON aul.application_case_id = ac.id
